arts.ttl: Premier League in CRISIS as they lose legal battle with Manchester City over 'unlawful' sponsorship rules - and the verdict could have serious consequences for all clubs
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Premier League has suffered a significant setback after a tribunal deemed its sponsorship rules - which operated for almost three years - null and void.

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Newcastle and the fear of someone dropping a Pollock
arts.sum: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! If not now, then when? The logic on Tyneside is that Saturday’s 3pm kick-off between Manchester City and Newcastle at the Etihad is where Pep Guardiola’s patronising of Wor Eddie ends. Erling Haaland? We’ve got Alexander Isak, man. He even runs around a bit. The managers have been well acquainted for some years now, back to Eddie’s Bournemouth days when his trusty bunch of former EFL-ers would turn up in Manchester to get thoroughly gubbed. Pep would float them back down to Dorset, his simpering tones gushing sweet praise of being “so, so good”, despite losing 4-0, 4-0 and 3-1 in successive seasons. Here [it] is simple – to do something we need to sell players” – Ruben Amorim on the reality of managing in the Big Sir Jim era at Manchester United. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: De Bruyne: City success not fully appreciated yet
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne has said he believes Manchester City's achievements will only be fully appreciated in the future as they continue to endure an inconsistent campaign.

arts.ttl: £20m transfer message Newcastle United must overcome as right-wing target watched
arts.sum: Newcastle United are continuing to search for attractive options for the right-side of Eddie Howe's attack and have been impressed by Celtic forward Nicolas Kuhn so far this season. Reports this week again suggest a watching brief has been undertaken when Celtic hosted Bayern Munich in the Champions League play-off stage in recent days.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer spots Carabao Cup final warning for Newcastle United after Liverpool 'punished'
arts.sum: Newcastle United legend Alan Shearer does not believe Arne Slot will make planned changes in the Carabao Cup final after being "punished" in the FA Cup last weekend. Shearer feels that the Carabao Cup is a major opportunity for Newcastle still though.

arts.ttl: Manual Akanji injury: Four possible right-back solutions for Man City as Pep Guardiola confirms significant blow
arts.sum: Following confirmation of Manuel Akanji's injury blow, Sports Mole takes a look at how Pep Guardiola could address his right-back dilemma at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Double Gameweek 32 confirmed for Newcastle + Crystal Palace
arts.sum: The match had originally been scheduled for Gameweek 29 The post Double Gameweek 32 confirmed for Newcastle + Crystal Palace appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Manuel Akanji sidelined for eight to 10 weeks in latest Man City injury blow
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola will check on Jack Grealish, who was also forced off against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: New date set for Newcastle v Palace
arts.sum: The Premier League have confirmed that Crystal Palace’s rearranged match away to Newcastle United will now kick-off at 19:30 BST on Wednesday, 16th April.
